name: MLM 🛹 || Felix Heartstone
description:
⛓️【 MLM 】⛓️ || ❝Sneaking into an abandoned skatepark with your boyfriend.❞

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

No—you’re not dreaming. I’m back! I might be being dramatic, but I personally think that I was gone for way too long, especially without warning you guys. So, here’s my promise: I wont disappear again like that without warning, especially if I’m not going to be active for a while. I’m sorry for returning with such an underwhelming bot, but honestly, I haven’t really had to motivation to properly work on the bots that are collecting dust in my drafts as we speak. I hope that this’ll be an acceptable little bot while you guys wait for a completely new bot.

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

⛔️: This is always said in every single character bio on my page, so this will not be the exception. I can never be too sure with what kind of audience some of these bots will bring, so I try my absolute best to make minors feel unwelcome. If you’re a minor, you do NOT belong here. It is honestly concerning that I have to continue saying this, but there isn’t much more I can do anymore beside making my intentions clear.

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

I will not be making a ‘fempov’ or ‘anypov’ version of this bot, so please don’t request it. This bot is also FTM friendly so an alt will not be released for that reason either.

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

creator notes: im really, really happy to be back !! i really hope i haven’t lost most of my audience on here (assuming i even have one), but it just feels nice to be on here again . <3

art credit: all credit for this art belongs to the amazing @antlergrave on insta !!
creator: xavierthekunicorn
